title: papuastelma
intro: Papuastelma, also known as Papuastelma heterophylla, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of New Guinea. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Papuastelma include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Papuastelma can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
